title: Sika Caulk Once White, 295 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
PREMIUM QUALITY – This acrylic caulk offers superior adhesion and low shrink properties that outperform other decorating caulks and fillers.

TWO-IN-ONE FILLER AND SEALANT – Provides a flexible, slump-resistant seal for use around skirting boards, ceiling cornices, window and door frames, stair treads, risings, and fixtures adjoining walls.
DURABLE FILLER – Perfect for repairing damaged plaster.
QUICK CURING TIME – Fast drying with a rapid tack time of 15 minutes and can be overpainted in 1 hour depending on site conditions.
TRUSTED BY THE TRADE – This trusted product has been tried & tested by leading tradespeople on the most demanding of projects.
RANGE OF SIZES – Available in 295ml and 380ml cartridges.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces must be clean, dry and dust free. All loose or flaking surface coatings, and old sealant and mastic joints, should be removed before application. Cut the tip of the cartridge taking care not to damage the thread. Apply nozzle and cut cleanly at an angle of 45° with an opening slightly larger than the gap to be sealed. Apply using a standard sealant gun. Smooth down within 20 minutes of application using a wetted spatula, piece of wood or wetted finger. Care should be taken at this point not to saturate the surface as this will delay drying.
